experiment: M1 — Field spaces: observations vs reasoning
pre_registered_rule: if multi-space does not beat single-space baseline, does not ship to default scoring
decision: NO SHIP — multi-space does not beat single-space, remains opt-in

cross_space_disagreement.note: Disagreement too low and uncorrelated to be useful as a signal

analysis: Equal-weight field-space averaging dilutes the default space signal. The v4 query regressed from nDCG 1.0 to 0.956 because field-space similarities pulled the combined score away from the strong default match. All other queries unchanged — field spaces neither help nor hurt. Cross-space disagreement averages 0.07, too low to serve as a quality signal.
